label: Move objects adding wires to connected pins
Horizontal Flip in place selected objects
Vertical Flip in place selected objects
Component browser
command: if {$new_file_browser} { file_chooser } else { load_file_dialog {Insert symbol} *.sym INITIALINSTDIR 2 }

label: Open selected schematic in new window
Open selected symbol in new window
Reload
command: if {[alert_ "Are you sure you want to reload?" {} 0 1] == 1} { xschem reload }

label: Set schematic to compare and compare with
Highlight net-pin mismatches on sel. instances
Show labels on unconnected instance pins
Color Postscript/SVG
command: if { $color_ps==1 } {xschem set color_ps 1} else { xschem set color_ps 0}

label: Unsel. partial sel. wires after stretch move
Replace \[ and \] for buses in SPICE netlist
command: input_line "Enter two characters to replace default bus \[\] delimiters:" "set bus_replacement_char"

label: Group bus slices in Verilog instances
No XCopyArea drawing model
command: if { $draw_window == 1} { xschem set draw_window 1} else { xschem set draw_window 0}

label: Fix for GPUs with broken tiled fill
command: if { $fix_broken_tiled_fill == 1} { xschem set fix_broken_tiled_fill 1 } else { xschem set fix_broken_tiled_fill 0 } xschem resetwin 1 1 1 0 0 xschem redraw

label: Crosshair size
command: input_line "Enter crosshair size (int, 0 = full screen width):" "set crosshair_size" $crosshair_size

label: Flat netlist
command: if { $flat_netlist==1 } {xschem set flat_netlist 1} else { xschem set flat_netlist 0}

label: Spectre netlist
command: xschem set netlist_type spectre; xschem redraw

label: Spice netlist
command: xschem set netlist_type spice; xschem redraw

label: VHDL netlist
command: xschem set netlist_type vhdl; xschem redraw

label: Verilog netlist
command: xschem set netlist_type verilog; xschem redraw

label: tEDAx netlist
command: xschem set netlist_type tedax; xschem redraw

label: Symbol global attrs
command: xschem set netlist_type symbol; xschem redraw

label: Set top level netlist name
command: input_line {Set netlist file name} {xschem set netlist_name} [xschem get netlist_name] 40

label: Utile Stimuli Editor (GUI)
command: inutile [xschem get current_dirname]/stimuli.[file rootname [file tail [xschem get schname]]]

label: Utile Stimuli Translate
command: inutile_translate [xschem get current_dirname]/stimuli.[file rootname [file tail [xschem get schname]]]

label: Add waveform reload launcher
command: xschem place_symbol [find_file_first launcher.sym] "name=h5\ndescr=\"load waves\" tclcommand=\"xschem raw_read \$netlist_dir/[file tail [file rootname [xschem get current_name]]].raw tran\" "

label: Annotate Operating Point into schematic
command: set tctx::retval [select_raw [xschem get topwindow]] set show_hidden_texts 1 if {$tctx::retval ne {}} { xschem annotate_op $tctx::retval } else { xschem annotate_op }

label: Hide graphs if no spice data loaded
LVS netlist + Top level is a .subckt
Make schematic and symbol from selected components
Attach net labels to component instance
Create symbol pins from selected schematic pins
Change selected inst. texts to floaters
Search all search-paths for schematic associated to symbol
Print list of highlight nets, with buses expanded
Create labels from highlight nets with 'i' prefix
Show instance Bounding boxes for subcircuit symbols
Show instance Bounding boxes for all symbols
Break wires at selected instance pins
Remove wires running through selected inst. pins
Break wires at mouse position, align cut point
Select conn. wires, stop at junctions
Fullscreen
command: if {\$fullscreen == 1} {set fullscreen 2} ;# avoid hiding menu in true fullscreen xschem fullscreen $topwin.drw

label: Set grid point size
command: input_line "Enter Grid point size (int or -1: $grid_point_size)" "set grid_point_size" $grid_point_size

label: Op Annotate
command: set tctx::retval [select_raw [xschem get topwindow]] set show_hidden_texts 1 if {$tctx::retval ne {}} { xschem annotate_op $tctx::retval } else { xschem annotate_op }
